final:
module binary_counter(
    input clk, reset, enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 4'b0;
    end
    else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
